name: Bathory
bio:
The fearsome Warden of the Castle Dungeon. He developed a unique set of magic different from the Vampire Clan's based on torture techniques.

Role: Group Control
Specialty: A mid-backline Control-type hero good at controlling enemies with Ghost Hounds. When an enemy is affected by [Burning Soul Fire], each Bleed effect causes [Burning Soul Fire] to stack one layer. When reaching 6 layers, it detonates and applies [Agony Prison], making the enemy unable to act and granting itself [Pleasure].

skillSlots.name: Death Edict
skillSlots.description: Launches 2 attacks, each dealing 110% M.DMG to 2 random enemies with 40% probability to apply [Bleed].

skillSlots.name: Hellhound Rend
skillSlots.description: Attacks all enemy targets for 800% Total M.DMG with 40% probability to apply [ATK Down I] (max DMG per Hero cannot exceed 400% of Caster's ATK).

effects.name: Bloodthirsty Beast
effects.description: When Bathory actively attacks and deals DMG, has 40% probability to apply [Fire of Flames].

effects.name: Bloodthirsty Beast
effects.description: Each time [Fire of Flames] is detonated, applies 1 stack of [Euphoria] to Bathory.

effects.name: Bloodthirsty Beast
effects.description: Increases Effect Hit Rate by 30% when attacking enemies with [Bleed].

effects.name: Bloodthirsty Beast
effects.description: Each time [Fire of Flames] is detonated, restores 10% HP to self and ally with lowest HP (max 2 triggers per turn).
